data.body: Fix implemented: made git rev-parse --show-toplevel conditional on TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR not being set and added GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1 in write_commit_event, _python_write_commit_event, _tag_add, _tag_remove, _write_preconditions, _read_latest_preconditions, and ticket_read_status. Tests pass: test-ticket-platform-compat.sh PASSED 18/18, test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh PASSED 13/13.
